# Regex Tester

> Free online regular expression tester at https://regex.toolzy.site

## What it does

Regex Tester lets you write and debug regular expressions in real time, directly in your browser. No account or installation required.

## Features

- Real-time match highlighting with color-coded overlays
- Flag toggles: g (global), i (case-insensitive), m (multiline), s (dotAll)
- Quick patterns library: Email, URL, IP Address, Date, Phone (Korean), HEX Color, Number, UUID
- Capture group display for each match in the Results panel
- Replace All with $1/$2 backreference support and copyable result
- Click any match to copy its value to clipboard

## Target audience

Software developers and anyone working with text processing who needs to quickly write, test, and iterate on regular expressions.

## URL

https://regex.toolzy.site
